race_name: L'Etape Australia by Tour de France

videos.title: L'Etape 2022 Weekend Away  - Save on Entry
videos.channel: L'Étape Australia by Tour de France
videos.transcript:
this November spend the perfect weekend
away at la tapa Australia only two hours
from Sydney discover the most beautiful
ride in Australia from bustling
Wollongong to the Southern Highlands and
the stunning coastal town of Kiama
bring your family along and enjoy
everything the South Coast has to offer
enjoy the Tour de France atmosphere with
live concerts French food and lots more
don't miss out save on your entry fee
register today at latap australia.com
